text_en: Every morning, I usually wake up at 6:30 AM when I hear my alarm. First, I open the window to let the fresh air and sunlight into my room. It makes me feel refreshed and ready for a new day. Instead of checking my phone right away, I often spend a few minutes stretching my body. Then, I go to the kitchen to make a cup of hot tea or coffee. The smell is amazing! While drinking, I like to sit quietly and plan my day. For breakfast, I usually have something simple like bread or fruit. After that, I brush my teeth, get dressed, and prepare to go to work or school. For me, a peaceful morning is the best way to start a happy day.
